s.c: Left, the seaport of Kavala on the Aegean.
s.cn: 图为爱琴海中的海港卡瓦拉。

s.c: No. 3 is from the seaport of Sakai, south of Osaka.
s.cn: 探花来自大阪南部的堺市。

t.cn: 使了解，使熟悉

s.c: You'll need time to familiarize yourself with our procedures.
s.cn: 你需要时间熟悉我们的程序。

s.c: The goal of the experiment was to familiarize the people with the new laws.
s.cn: 该实验的目的是使人们熟悉新的规则。

t.cn: 不正确的，错误的；不适当的；不合礼仪的

s.c: It would be improper to comment at this stage.
s.cn: 在这个阶段发表评论并不恰当。

s.c: Its image has been sullied by $9 billion in improper accounting.
s.cn: 其形象被90亿的假账所毁。

t.cn: 游标
光标；[计] 游标，指针

s.c: He moves the cursor, clicks the mouse.
s.cn: 他移动光标，点击鼠标。

s.c: Position the cursor where you want the new margins to begin.
s.cn: 将光标放在你所要的新页边空白开端。

t.cn: 男学生；学童

s.c: Schoolboy Josh Henderson, 10, holds his hand against that of the world's tallest man.
s.cn: 10岁男生乔什·亨德森握着世界上最高的人的手。

s.c: A schoolboy once asked George Daniels what he had at the end of the chain that led to his pocket.
s.cn: 一名男学生曾经问乔治·丹尼尔斯，他那根伸进衣袋的链子末端有什么。

t.cn: 结霜；霜状白糖；无光泽面；去光泽
以霜覆盖；冻坏；起霜
结霜的；磨砂的；消光的

s.c: She was frosting the cupcakes while we talked.
s.cn: 我们交谈时，她在给杯形蛋糕撒糖霜。

s.c: There's butter in the frosting I'm using, but we're talking about the cake.
s.cn: 我用的糖霜里有黄油，但我们说的是蛋糕。

t.cn: 势利
势利，虚荣；势利的行为或语言

s.c: He had a definite strain of snobbery in him.
s.cn: 他这个人明显有一股势利小人的气味。

s.c: He is spoiled, arrogant and has a tendency toward snobbery.
s.cn: 他被宠坏了，很傲慢，而且有势利倾向。

t.cn: 题写；题献；铭记；雕

s.c: There is really nothing to inscribe but name and age, you see.
s.cn: 您看，除了姓名和年龄就没有什么别的要刻的了。

s.c: Sometimes, though, you need to inscribe variation down at the class level.
s.cn: 但有时候需要记下类级别的差异。

t.cn: 菊花
菊；菊花，菊株

s.c: The Double Ninth cake is also known as "chrysanthemum cake" or "flower cake".
s.cn: 重阳糕又名“菊糕”或“花糕”。

s.c: Drinking chrysanthemum is regarded as a way to prevent disasters and bad things.
s.cn: 喝菊花茶被认为是一种预防灾难和坏事的方法。

t.cn: 结论性的，毫无疑问的

s.c: Her attorneys claim there is no conclusive evidence that any murders took place.
s.cn: 她的律师们声称没有任何发生过谋杀的确凿证据。

s.c: There is no conclusive proof.
s.cn: 没有确凿的证据。

t.cn: 道路；路面；车行道；铁路的路基

s.c: Workers have erected scaffolding around the base of the tower below the roadway.
s.cn: 工人们已经在车行道下的塔基四周竖起了脚手架。

s.c: Marks in the roadway seem to indicate that he skidded taking a sharp turn.
s.cn: 从车道上的痕迹看，他似乎在急转弯时打滑了。

t.cn: 花瓣

s.c: A midge gathers pollen from a cacao flower by sticking its head inside a "petal pouch" that contains both pollen and a sticky nectar reward.
s.cn: 一只摇蚊把它的头伸进一个“花瓣囊”里，收集可可花的花粉，“花瓣囊”里既有花粉，也有粘稠的花蜜。

s.c: Designer Christian Louboutin Petal Sandals Light Pink is a kind of pink sandals with buckle detail at ankle strap, two petals along vamp, and a round open toe.
s.cn: 设计师克里斯提·布鲁托浅粉花瓣凉鞋是一种脚踝带上有繁复的带扣、鞋面上有两个花瓣、圆头露趾鞋尖的浅粉色凉鞋。

t.cn: 一贯地，始终；一致地

s.c: It's something I have consistently denied.
s.cn: 这是我始终否认的事。

s.c: The company has consistently denied it had knowingly broken arms embargoes.
s.cn: 该公司始终否认故意违反了武器禁运规定。

t.cn: [水产] 幼体，[昆] 幼虫

s.c: The image above is of the larva of a ground-nesting solitary bee from Turkey.
s.cn: 上图是来自土耳其的地面筑巢独居蜂的幼虫。

s.c: The casing is nearly airtight, which helps protect the vulnerable egg and later larva.
s.cn: 外层几乎是密封的，可以保护脆弱的蜂卵，以及后来的幼虫。

t.cn: 缎子；缎子衣服
光滑的；绸缎做的；似缎的

s.c: The blankets were bound with satin.
s.cn: 那些毯子是用缎子包边的。

s.c: The final stage of waxing left it with a satin sheen.
s.cn: 最后一道打蜡使之有了缎子般的光泽。

t.cn: 霰弹猎枪；猎枪，火枪；滑膛枪；散弹猎枪；副驾驶位
猎枪的；被迫的
用猎枪射击；强迫

s.c: He kept a primed shotgun in his office.
s.cn: 他在办公室放了一杆装好子弹的散弹猎枪。

s.c: Anthony died from a shotgun blast to the face.
s.cn: 安东尼因被猎枪击中面部而死。

t.cn: 男爵；大亨；巨头

s.c: I once carried a letter to a baron of that sort.
s.cn: 有一次，我送一封信给一个那样的男爵。

s.c: You've also done security for Sacha Baron Cohen. Is he in character or out?
s.cn: 你还负责了萨夏男爵科恩的安全。他是否与他身份相符呢？

t.cn: 枝叶，叶子

s.c: The foliage was soft and feathery.
s.cn: 叶子柔软，有如羽毛一般。

s.c: It was so thick, and the foliage so dense, that it was quite fatiguing to proceed.
s.cn: 它是那么茂密，树叶是那么稠密，要往前走是很累的。

t.cn: 药房；诊疗所；防治站

s.c: He bought some pills from the dispensary.
s.cn: 他从学校的医务室买了一些药片。

s.c: Here's my prescription. Please take it to the dispensary.
s.cn: 这是我开的处方，请拿它到药房取药。

t.cn: 猩红色的，鲜红色的；涨得通红的；罪孽深重的，淫荡的
鲜红色，猩红色；红衣，鲜红色布

s.c: Scarlet fever is highly contagious.
s.cn: 猩红热的接触传染性很强。

s.c: The scarlet of the wings shades into pink at the tips.
s.cn: 猩红的翅膀到了翼端渐变成浅红。

t.cn: 云雀
云雀；百灵鸟；欢乐
骑马玩乐；嬉耍

s.c: She was called the Lark in the neighborhood.
s.cn: 她在附近被称为百灵鸟。

s.c: Cosette, the lark, as she is called hereabouts!
s.cn: 云雀珂赛特，在这一带这么叫她！

t.cn: 漫步，闲逛；扫视，扫过；遨游
漫步

s.c: I like to roam around the fields.
s.cn: 我喜欢在田野中漫步。

s.c: Barn eggs, sometimes called Percher, are laid by hens that have the freedom to roam a henhouse.
s.cn: 谷仓蛋，有时被称为 Percher，是由在可以在鸡舍里自由漫步的母鸡下的蛋。

t.cn: 内部的人，知情人

s.c: An insider said, "Katharine has told friends it is time to end her career."
s.cn: 一名知情者说，“凯瑟琳告诉朋友们她该结束自己的职业生涯了。”

s.c: A realistic look at the crimes reveals that the offender is likely to be an employee of the firm against which the crime has been committed, i.e., an "insider".
s.cn: 从现实角度来看待这些罪行，就会发现，犯罪者很可能是受害公司的雇员，即“内部人员”。

t.cn: 高尔夫球手

s.c: She was a good golfer and tennis player.
s.cn: 她曾是一名优秀的高尔夫球手和网球运动员。

s.c: Sarazen became the first golfer to win all four majors.
s.cn: 萨拉曾成为了第一个赢得全部4场大赛的高尔夫球员。

t.cn: 百叶窗，活动护窗；快门；开闭器
<美>使停业，使倒闭；关上的百叶窗，合上的遮光板

s.c: There are a few things you should check before pressing the shutter release.
s.cn: 在按快门之前，有几件事情你应该检查。

s.c: Shall I press the shutter?
s.cn: 我要按快门吗？

t.cn: 神学；宗教体系

s.c: The first is the radical theology, and the second is this poem's equally radical and equally daring original verse form.
s.cn: 第一个是激进的神学，第二个是这首诗同样激进、同样大胆的原始诗歌形式。

s.c: Texts dealing with economic matters predominated, as they always had done; but at this point works of theology, literature, history, and law also appeared.
s.cn: 同以往一样，处理经济问题的文章占主导地位；但此时，也出现了神学、文学、历史和法律的著作。

t.cn: 灯丝；细丝；细线；单纤维

s.c: The light of an electric lamp comes from an incandescent filament.
s.cn: 电灯光亮来自白炽灯丝。

s.c: Edison's bulb is, at its core, a burning filament that casts the glow of a flame.
s.cn: 爱迪生的灯泡，在它的中心，有一个燃烧的灯丝产生火焰的光芒。

t.cn: <美>二年级学生；有两年经验的人
第二张的，第二部的；二年级的，二年级学生的

s.c: Their daughter is a sophomore at Yale.
s.cn: 他们的女儿在耶鲁大学读大二。

s.c: Meanwhile, Olivia Rubin, a sophomore at Emory, says she hardly even considers take-homes true exams.
s.cn: 同时，埃默里大学的大二学生奥利维亚·鲁宾说，她几乎不认为在家完成的考试是真正的考试。

t.cn: 反感，不喜欢
<古>厌恶，不喜欢

s.c: He professed a violent distaste for everything related to commerce, production, and money.
s.cn: 他对一切与商业、生产和金钱相关的东西表示了强烈的厌恶。

s.c: In our interviews, many students viewed politics with suspicion and distaste.
s.cn: 在我们的采访中，许多学生对政治持怀疑和厌恶的态度。

t.cn: 巡回演出团
巡回演出

s.c: The first female troupe (剧团) of Yue opera was created in 1923, and then female performers gradually took the place of the males.
s.cn: 1923年，第一个女子越剧团成立，随后女演员逐渐取代了男演员的位置。

s.c: The dancing troupe will give three performances at the Century Theatre.
s.cn: 这个舞蹈团将在世纪剧院演出三场。

t.cn: 向前；今后

s.c: He eased slowly forwards.
s.cn: 他缓缓向前移动。

s.c: The traffic rolled slowly forwards.
s.cn: 车流缓缓地向前挪动。

t.cn: 肠；肠管
内部的，国内的

s.c: Mice that have been given morphine are very likely to develop blood poisoning because bacteria that normally reside in the intestine typically respond to morphine by migrating into the bloodstream.
s.cn: 摄入了吗啡的老鼠很可能会发生血液中毒，因为通常存在于肠道的细菌会通过迁移到血液中来对吗啡做出反应。

s.c: Models of segmental heterotopic small intestine transplantation were established using three sleevelet vascular anastomosis.
s.cn: 采用三袖套血管吻合法建立大鼠节段性异位小肠移植模型。

t.cn: 厌恶的；厌烦的
使恶心；使讨厌

s.c: He disgusted many with his boorish behaviour.
s.cn: 他以其粗鲁的行为使许多人感到厌恶。

s.c: The level of violence in the film really disgusted me.
s.cn: 影片中的暴力程度实在让我反感。

t.cn: 圆括号；插入成分，插入语；插曲，间歇

s.c: Named parameters without parenthesis.
s.cn: 没有圆括号的命名参数。

s.c: Write a right parenthesis.
s.cn: 写入右括号。

t.cn: 大树枝

s.c: I rested my fishing rod against a pine bough.
s.cn: 我把我的鱼竿靠在松树的一个大树枝上。

s.c: The Tree trembled so in every bough that one of the tapers set fire to the foliage.
s.cn: 枞树的每根枝子都在发抖，弄得一根蜡烛烧着了一根枝子。

t.cn: 脆弱的，虚弱的；易碎的，易坏的；脆弱的，意志薄弱的
灯心草篮；<美，非正式，旧>女人

s.c: She lay in bed looking frail.
s.cn: 她躺在床上，看上去很虚弱。

s.c: Human nature is frail.
s.cn: 人性脆弱。

t.cn: 使…满足；使…安心
满足的；心安的
满足的，满意的

s.c: He was a contented man.
s.cn: 他是个心满意足的人。

s.c: Tania kept the children reasonably quiet and contented.
s.cn: 塔妮娅把孩子们料理得安心而满足。

t.cn: 种族灭绝，大屠杀

s.c: They have alleged that acts of genocide and torture were carried out.
s.cn: 他们声称实施了大屠杀和酷刑。

s.c: Preventing genocide is a collective and individual responsibility.
s.cn: 防止灭绝种族罪是集体和个人的责任。

t.cn: 服从的，顺从的

s.c: He was always obedient to his father's wishes.
s.cn: 他一向顺从父亲的意愿。

s.c: He was very respectful at home and obedient to his parents.
s.cn: 他在家里很尊重人而且顺从父母。

t.cn: 无耻的，不要脸的

s.c: The activities that may have got the benefit of the doubt in the bubble years now look like shameless envelope-pushing.
s.cn: 这些活动在经济泡沫时期也许能无罪推定，但现在看来，更像是无耻的挑战原则底线。

s.c: The shameless admission of the stitch-up should have been a humiliating slap in the face for any self-respecting audience.
s.cn: 这次权利交接中无耻的行为，对任何有自尊心的观众而言，应该像一巴掌打在脸上那样耻辱。

t.cn: 刚毅；不屈不挠；勇气

s.c: They bore their plight with stoicism and fortitude.
s.cn: 他们以坚忍刚毅的精神面对困境。

s.c: He suffered a long series of illnesses with tremendous dignity and fortitude.
s.cn: 他在病魔的长久折磨下表现出了高度的尊严和刚毅。

t.cn: 下雨夹雪；下冰雹
雨夹雪；雨淞
雨夹雪，冻雨；雨淞

s.c: At any time I could run into rain, sleet, snow, or scorching heat.
s.cn: 任何时候我都可能会碰到下雨、下雨夹雪、下雪或是酷暑天。

s.c: By the time they reached the mountaintop, the sleet had changed to fluffy snow.
s.cn: 当他们到达山顶上的时候，雨夹雪已经变成了柔软的雪花。

t.cn: 虔诚的；敬神的；可嘉的；尽责的

s.c: He was brought up by pious female relatives.
s.cn: 他是由虔诚的女性亲属抚养大的。

s.c: Catherine was a pious, earnest woman.
s.cn: 凯瑟琳是位虔诚、真挚的女子。

t.cn: 剩余物，残留物；遗体，遗骸；古迹，遗迹
仍然是，保持不变；逗留，留下；剩余，余留

s.c: The economy remains sluggish.
s.cn: 经济保持缓慢发展。

s.c: The theory remains untested.
s.cn: 该理论仍未经过验证。

t.cn: 癔病患者；歇斯底里患者
歇斯底里的；癔病的；亢奋的

s.c: You, my dear, are an unhinged hysteric.
s.cn: 你，我亲爱的，是个歇斯底里的疯子。

s.c: Objective To understand family characteristic and psychogenesis of hysteric.
s.cn: 目的了解癔症患者的家庭特征及其心理机制。

t.cn: 跳板；出发点
利用跳板跃进

s.c: The 1981 budget was the springboard for an economic miracle.
s.cn: 1981年的预算造就了一场经济奇迹。

s.c: The document provided a springboard for a lot of useful discussion.
s.cn: 这份文件引发出许多有益的讨论。

t.cn: 乐于助人的
十几岁
十多岁，十几岁；青少年

s.c: She began writing poetry in her teens.
s.cn: 她从十几岁开始写诗。

s.c: Are mothers and teens inevitably at loggerheads?
s.cn: 母亲与青少年不可避免地会发生争执吗？

t.cn: 特殊的，特别的

s.c: Joyce took especial care to include her.
s.cn: 乔伊斯特别留意把她加进来。

s.c: The lecture will be of especial interest to history students.
s.cn: 学历史的学生会对这个讲座特别有兴趣。

t.cn: 内地， 腹地； 内地贸易区
内地；穷乡僻壤；靠港口供应的内地贸易区

s.c: Bailyn argues that the colonies were a half-civilized hinterland of the European culture system.
s.cn: 贝林认为，殖民地是欧洲文化体系的半文明腹地。

s.c: China's economic hinterland remains vast.
s.cn: 中国的经济腹地依然广阔。

t.cn: 选举人，投票人；有投票权者

s.c: With the high voter registration, many will be voting for the first time.
s.cn: 由于高的投票者登记率，很多人将是第一次投票。

s.c: One voter in Brasilia summed up the mood – "Politicians have lost credibility," he complained.
s.cn: 一位巴西利亚选民简述了人们的心情–“政治家们已丧失信誉，”他抱怨道。

t.cn: 军团；众多；军队
众多的；大量的

s.c: Certainly, the borders of our world seemed to be impacted when some white man or woman showed up where he or she did not belong, such as at the black Legion Hall.
s.cn: 当然，当一些白人男性或女性出现在不属于他们的地方，比如在黑人军团大厅，我们世界的分界线就似乎受到了影响。

s.c: Certainly, the borders of our world seemed to be impacted on when some white man or woman showed up where he or she did not belong, such as at the black Legion Hall.
s.cn: 当然，当一些白人男性或女性出现在不属于他们的地方，比如在黑人军团大厅，我们世界的分界线就似乎受到了影响。

t.cn: 睡衣

s.c: She pulled the strap of her nightgown onto her shoulder.
s.cn: 她把睡衣的带子拉到她的肩上。

s.c: She was still in her nightgown, with her hair hanging loose over her shoulders.
s.cn: 她仍穿着睡衣，头发披散在肩上。

t.cn: 解释的，说明的

s.c: These statements are accompanied by a series of explanatory notes.
s.cn: 这些声明附有一系列的解释性注释。

s.c: There are explanatory notes at the back of the book.
s.cn: 书后有注解。

t.cn: 俚语
<非正式>谩骂

s.c: 'Old man' is a slang term for 'father'.
s.cn: old man为俚语，指父亲。

s.c: Archie liked to think he kept up with current slang.
s.cn: 阿奇乐于自认为能跟得上时新俚语。

t.cn: 芹菜

s.c: The celery is fresh and crisp.
s.cn: 这芹菜新鲜脆嫩。

s.c: Which vegetable do you like best, cucumber, carrot or celery?
s.cn: 你最喜欢黄瓜、胡萝卜还是芹菜？

t.cn: 使恢复生机，使复兴

s.c: Private courier companies, which have more dollars to spend, use their expertise in logistics to help revitalize damaged areas after a disaster.
s.cn: 私人快递公司可支配的资金更多，它们利用自身在物流方面的专业技术来助力灾区的重振。

s.c: To revitalize the sector, in 2006 the government was considering renationalizing some enterprises.
s.cn: 为了振兴该行业，2006年政府正考虑将一些企业重新国有化。

t.cn: 深红色的；通红的
深红色
变红；深红

s.c: Aunt Polly blushed crimson with humiliation, and frowned and shook her head at Tom.
s.cn: 波莉姨妈羞得满脸通红，对汤姆又是皱眉又是摇头。

s.c: Breeches of crimson velvet, silk stockings, and low, silver-buckled slippers completed his costume.
s.cn: 一条深红色的丝绒马裤、一对丝袜和一双银扣拖鞋构成了他的装束。

t.cn: 弹劾；归咎；怀疑
控告，检举；弹劾；怀疑

s.c: To this thing itself I am impeach.
s.cn: 对这件事本身我是存疑的。

s.c: Richard M. Nixon: They can't impeach me for bombing Cambodia.
s.cn: 尼克松：他们不能控告我对柬埔寨的轰炸。

t.cn: 男校友；男毕业生

s.c: We invited a famous alumnus to give away the school prizes.
s.cn: 我们请了一位著名的校友来颁发学校的奖金。

s.c: Mr Noda is the first Matsushita alumnus to lead Japan.
s.cn: 野田佳彦是松下政经塾第一位执掌日本的校友。

t.cn: 明喻

s.c: The simile is there ostensibly to compare Satan with the great sea beast, leviathan.
s.cn: 这个明喻很明显是将撒旦和凶猛的海中野兽利维坦进行了对比。

s.c: The pastoral elegance of this little simile really catches us off guard.
s.cn: 这个有着田园诗情画意般优雅的小比喻确实让我们毫无防备。

t.cn: 器具，用具

s.c: Taking a camping utensil that can serve as a knife, fork and spoon to school.
s.cn: 他把一个可以做刀、勺子还有叉子的野营工具带到学校去了。

s.c: Objective To discuss the limitation of ultrasonic detection on prevenception utensil.
s.cn: 目的探讨超声在宫内节育器观察上的局限性。

t.cn: 下水道，阴沟；缝纫工，缝纫机；司膳管家
为……铺设污水管道，用下水道排除……的污水；清洗污水管

s.c: He would tell her, "Oh, sinful wretch, who is spreading disease and filth like an open sewer."
s.cn: 他会告诉她：“噢，可恶的家伙，像露天下水道一样传播疾病和污秽。”

s.c: Concerns about public health led to the construction between 1876 and 1904 of three separate sewer systems to serve metropolitan Boston.
s.cn: 出于对公众健康的担忧，1876年至1904年期间，为了服务于波士顿市区，政府修建了三个独立的下水道系统。

t.cn: 肚子，胃

s.c: Mummy, I've got a tummy ache.
s.cn: 妈妈，我肚子疼。

s.c: My tummy felt very tender.
s.cn: 我的肚子一碰就痛。

t.cn: 舢板；小船

s.c: Sometimes we can see schools of fish pass by the sampan.
s.cn: 有时我们可以看到成群的鱼儿从舢板旁边游过。

s.c: I decided to take part in the single sampan contest at the sports meeting.
s.cn: 我决定参加运动会的单人舢舨比赛。

t.cn: 骗子医生，江湖郎中
呱呱声，嘎嘎声；庸医，江湖郎中；<非正式>医生
呱呱叫，嘎嘎叫；<非正式>大声说蠢话，咭咭呱呱

s.c: Suddenly he heard a quack.
s.cn: 突然，他听到嘎的一声。

s.c: Quack, quack, quack. Walk like us!
s.cn: 嘎嘎嘎，像我们一样走路！

t.cn: 葡萄属植物，葡萄藤；藤本植物，攀缘植物
长成藤蔓，爬藤

s.c: The easiest way to propagate a vine is to take hardwood cuttings.
s.cn: 繁殖葡萄藤最容易的办法就是采取硬木扦插。

s.c: A vine wraps round a big tree.
s.cn: 一根藤绕在一棵大树上。

t.cn: 鼹鼠；间谍，内奸；痣；胎块，肿瘤；墨西哥辣酱；防波堤，海堤港；摩尔

s.c: Here the Rat nudged the Mole.
s.cn: 说到这里，水鼠兰特用胳膊肘捅了捅鼹鼠莫尔。

s.c: The Mole wriggled with curiosity.
s.cn: 鼹鼠好奇地扭着身子。

t.cn: 想家的
想家的；思乡病的

s.c: He felt homesick, but made a brave attempt to appear cheerful.
s.cn: 他很想家，但却竭力表现得很高兴。

s.c: He was so homesick that he could hardly endure the misery of it.
s.cn: 他非常想家，几乎不能忍受这种痛苦。

t.cn: [光] 光学

s.c: If such materials became generally available to the optics industry the payoffs from such a breakthrough would be enormous.
s.cn: 如果此类材料能够普遍用于光学产业，这一突破带来的收益将是巨大的。

s.c: Scientists studying optics and chromatics today still marvel at his findings.
s.cn: 今天研究光学和色彩学的科学家们仍对他的发现感到惊奇。

t.cn: 黑人城镇，黑人居住区；镇区；住宅新区；<美>6英里见方的地区；<澳新>小镇

s.c: Once again there's been ferocious bloodletting in the township.
s.cn: 镇上再次发生了血腥杀戮事件。

s.c: Line-ups formed daily at the land offices as township after township was opened for settlement.
s.cn: 当越来越多的居住区被开放为定居地，人们每天在国有土地管理局前排队。

t.cn: 使发清脆的声响
叮当声
发叮当声；撒尿

s.c: Take me to the potty. I need to tinkle.
s.cn: 带我去夜壶那里。我要撒尿。

s.c: She needed a tinkle.
s.cn: 她要撒尿。

t.cn: 修女，尼姑

s.c: It has confirmed me in my decision not to become a nun.
s.cn: 这已让我坚信我不当修女的决定是正确的。

s.c: Were you a nun here eleven years ago?
s.cn: 你是十一年前在这里的修女吗？

t.cn: 应付的；到期的；可付的；可获利的
应付款

s.c: A 10% deposit is payable in advance.
s.cn: 须预付10%的押金。

s.c: The money is not payable until January 31.
s.cn: 这钱要到1月31日才可支付。

t.cn: 向……装货；把……装入车船；装货；负载；有……的偏向
载着的；装满弹药的；腰包鼓鼓的；喝酒过多的；有多种附加功能的；欺骗的；话中有话的；不公平的；诱导性的

s.c: Have you loaded the software?
s.cn: 你装上这种软件了吗？

s.c: I've just loaded my truck up.
s.cn: 我刚刚装完我的卡车。

t.cn: 世界语

s.c: Esperanto was invented as an auxiliary language.
s.cn: 世界语是作为辅助语发明的。

s.c: Esperanto has always been popular among socialists.
s.cn: 世界语在社会主义者中一直很受欢迎。

t.cn: 教学大纲；事项举要

s.c: I was given a free hand in designing the syllabus.
s.cn: 我获准全权制订教学大纲。

s.c: We need to design a new syllabus for the third year.
s.cn: 我们需要为三年级学生制订一个新的课程大纲。

t.cn: 祭坛，圣坛，圣餐台；讲坛

s.c: He genuflected in front of the altar.
s.cn: 他在祭坛前屈膝施礼。

s.c: The altar had been defiled by vandals.
s.cn: 圣坛受到破坏公物者的肆意践踏。

t.cn: 拦截，阻截；抄截；截断，中止；截取，截断
拦截，截获；截点，截距

s.c: It is illegal to intercept radio messages.
s.cn: 窃听无线电信息是违法的。

s.c: It seemed like an awful thing to do when they're bringing these falcons and hawks who were imported to intercept these people.
s.cn: 当他们带着猎鹰和鹰来拦截这些人时，这似乎是一件可怕的事情。

t.cn: 独居，独处，孤独；偏僻的地方，无人居住的地方

s.c: He enjoyed his moments of solitude before the pressures of the day began in earnest.
s.cn: 他很喜欢一天的压力真正开始前的独处时刻。

s.c: The boy's solitude is like the mower.
s.cn: 这个男孩的孤独就像割草者一样。

t.cn: 燃烧的，充满火焰的；火红的，血红的；易怒的，暴躁的；怒气冲冲的，充满激情的；辣的

s.c: The sky turned from fiery orange to lemon yellow.
s.cn: 天空由火红色变成了柠檬黄。

s.c: She has a fiery temper.
s.cn: 她脾气暴躁。

t.cn: 渴望，热心

s.c: I couldn't hide my eagerness to get back home.
s.cn: 我无法掩饰想回家的渴望。

s.c: He amazes me with his quickness and eagerness to learn.
s.cn: 他敏思好学，令我惊讶。

t.cn: 无情的；不仁慈的，不厚道的
不友善的，不亲切的；刻薄的；恶劣的

s.c: It's not in his nature to be unkind.
s.cn: 他天生不会刻薄。

s.c: He was never actually unkind to them.
s.cn: 其实他从没有对他们不好。

t.cn: 谦虚，谦逊；保守，端庄；适度，有限；羞怯，腼腆

s.c: He accepted the award with characteristic modesty.
s.cn: 他以他一贯的谦逊态度接受了奖励。

s.c: "Your modesty is a cover for your overweening conceit," she said.
s.cn: “你用谦逊的外表掩饰自负的内心，”她说。

t.cn: 拉丁语；拉丁人；拉丁音乐
拉丁语的，用拉丁语写成的；拉丁语系国家的；拉丁人的

s.c: Very few students learn Latin now.
s.cn: 现在学拉丁语的学生少得很。

s.c: Latin nouns have case, number and gender.
s.cn: 拉丁语名词有格、数和性。

t.cn: 煤油，火油

s.c: A leakage of kerosene has polluted water supplies.
s.cn: 泄漏的煤油已污染了水源。

s.c: "What if there is no kerosene this winter?" said Al.—"So what?" she said. "We still have electricity."
s.cn: “今年冬天如果没有煤油可怎么办呢？”阿尔说。—“那又怎么样？”她说。“我们还有电呢。”

t.cn: 横笛吹奏者

s.c: He is an accomplished classical flautist. He holds both Peruvian and American passports, and is married to an American.
s.cn: 他擅长吹奏古典长笛，手持秘鲁和美国两本护照，并娶了美国人为妻。

s.c: Hampered by illness and poverty, he devoted himself to poetry and to music, becoming a flautist in a Baltimore orchestra.
s.cn: 他在贫病交迫之下献身于诗歌与音乐，做了巴尔的摩交响乐团的笛手。

t.cn: 战术的；策略的；善于策略的

s.c: He had made a humiliating tactical error and he had to go.
s.cn: 他犯下了一个令他耻辱的战术错误，被迫离职。

s.c: They have removed all tactical nuclear missiles that could strike Europe.
s.cn: 他们已经拆走了所有可能攻击欧洲的战术性核导弹。

t.cn: [脊椎] 响尾蛇

s.c: His wild-west origins mean that he has rattlesnake fangs, and unlike European vampires, he is powered by the sun.
s.cn: 他来自狂野的西部，这意味着他有响尾蛇般的毒牙，不像欧洲产的吸血鬼，他由太阳提供能量。

s.c: One family of completely harmless snakes, the kingsnake, has also evolved serum that neutralizes rattlesnake venom.
s.cn: 一种完全无毒的蛇家族，王蛇，也进化出了能中和响尾蛇毒液的血清。

t.cn: 流星烟火；冲天火箭
飞涨，猛涨；……猛然上涨

s.c: Using corn as motor fuel will cause the price of corn to skyrocket.
s.cn: 使用玉米作为汽车燃料将导致玉米价格飞涨。

s.c: As Silicon Valley has become home to more successful companies, the flood of people to the area has caused housing prices to skyrocket.
s.cn: 随着更多成功企业进军硅谷，人们也开始涌入该地区，导致房价攀升。

t.cn: 芦苇；<英>茅草；<文>芦笛；与芦苇相似的人或物；<文>箭，矢；小凸嵌线脚；簧片，簧舌；簧乐器；接触器；筘，钢箍
用芦苇盖，用芦苇装饰

s.c: They inhabit reed huts built on stilts above the water.
s.cn: 他们居住在建在水中木桩上的芦苇草屋里。

s.c: Referee Michael Reed had no hesitation in awarding a penalty.
s.cn: 裁判迈克尔·里德毫不犹豫地判了罚球。

t.cn: 不精确的，不准确的

s.c: The book is both inaccurate and exaggerated.
s.cn: 那本书既不准确又夸大事实。

s.c: This entire conception is scientifically inaccurate.
s.cn: 整个概念在科学上是不准确的。

t.cn: 污点，污迹；烟熏火堆；模糊不清的景象
把……擦模糊；弄脏，涂污；用浓烟熏

s.c: There was a dark smudge on his forehead.
s.cn: 他前额上有一个黑色污点。

s.c: She kissed me, careful not to smudge me with her fresh lipstick.
s.cn: 她亲吻了我，小心翼翼地不让她新抹的唇膏弄脏我。

t.cn: 芜菁，萝卜；芜菁块根，芜菁甘蓝块根；类芜菁甘蓝块根；<非正式>大而厚的老式表

s.c: A turnip is another root vegetable.
s.cn: 萝卜是另一种根茎类蔬菜。

s.c: The iron horse conducted the wood pig and turnip rabbit to play programs.
s.cn: 铁皮马指挥木头猪和萝卜兔演节目。

t.cn: 海鲜；海味；海产食品

s.c: Seafood is a speciality on the island.
s.cn: 海味是岛上的特产。

s.c: The seafood here is a gourmet's delight.
s.cn: 这儿的海鲜是美食家的一大享受。

t.cn: 锯；锯床；格言，谚语；锯齿状部位
锯，锯开；乱剪；拉锯似的来回移动；<加拿大> 通过互让解决，相互妥协
看见；观看；理解，领会

s.c: I saw her picture everywhere.
s.cn: 我到处看到她的照片。

s.c: I saw Jack the other day.
s.cn: 我前几天看到杰克了。

t.cn: 记录，得分；账单；<史>符木；标志牌，标签
相符，吻合；计算，合计；得分，进球

s.c: Keep a tally of how much you spend while you're away.
s.cn: 在外出期间，把你的花费都记录下来。

s.c: They do not keep a tally of visitors to the palace, but it is very popular.
s.cn: 他们没有对来宫殿的游客作一个记录，不过这个地方非常受欢迎的。

t.cn: 高粱，蜀黍；高粱糖浆

s.c: I once had a dream, in which I saw rice plants as tall as sorghum.
s.cn: 我曾经做过一个梦，在梦里水稻和高粱一样高。

s.c: Nevertheless, yields of maize, sorghum and wheat doubled between 1983 and 1985.
s.cn: 然而，玉米、高粱和小麦的产量在1983年至1985年间翻了一番。
